maintenance_scope: stock universe, market-data quality, provider reliability, batching, corporate-action audit, and scanner reliability only

telegram.reason: maintenance scope explicitly forbids Telegram alerts and tests

same_job_status.reason: the same maintenance work already exists as a draft PR; authenticated Actions run-list and workflow_dispatch tools were not available, so no duplicate workflow was started

main_hourly_stock_scan.telegram_behavior: validates Telegram secrets and may send only qualifying stock setup alerts; not dispatched in this run

main_stock_candidate_refresh.telegram_behavior: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID are blank for candidate refresh

draft_stock_universe_maintenance.telegram_behavior: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID blank for universe dry run

recent_actions_visibility.known_gap: the public Actions HTML listed recent historical runs but did not expose authenticated queued/running state or logs through available tools

yfinance.observed_behavior: yf.download(auto_adjust=True) with retries, timeout controlled externally by workflows, threads disabled, and in-memory TTL cache; returned rows include timestamp, open, high, low, close, and volume
confirmed_gaps: no persisted provider symbol universe on main
no independent provider metadata comparison on main
no persisted adjusted/unadjusted OHLCV pair on main
no split/dividend/corporate-action evidence persisted in main market-data rows
no provider pagination or symbol listing cursor on main

draft_pr_14.reason: provider listing source choices and complete exchange files remain unreviewed and unmerged

batch_progress.reason: no complete provider listing run was dispatched; no provider listing files or production SQLite cache were available

sqlite_and_cache_state.reason: Actions artifacts/caches/logs were not exposed through available tools

corporate_actions.main_confirmed_gap: main yfinance adapter uses adjusted OHLCV and does not preserve split, dividend, unadjusted OHLCV, corporate-action evidence, or data/strategy version per historical alert
corporate_actions.draft_pr_14_status: adds a corporate_actions table and regression scaffolding for split gaps but does not yet complete live provider validation

data_quality_checks.reason_tests_not_run: no local repository checkout is available; public clone and API access from the container returned HTTP 403; connector supports file inspection but not full test execution

confirmed_defects.description: main relies on a static config/stocks.yaml list rather than legal provider or exchange symbol directories
main adjusted yfinance rows do not preserve independent adjusted/unadjusted prices, splits, dividends, corporate-action evidence, or data/strategy version for old alerts
README still describes scheduled stock workflows even though inspected workflow files are workflow_dispatch only on main

rollback.draft_pr_14: see docs/STOCK_UNIVERSE_ROLLBACK.md on the same branch

known_gaps: No workflow_dispatch was performed because queued/running state could not be fully verified and a matching draft PR already exists.
No complete eligible-symbol count is available; do not claim broad exchange coverage yet.
No provider listing files, exchange files, failed-symbol logs, Actions artifacts, or production SQLite caches were downloadable through the available tools.
